entries.result: Blazing sun scorches the landscape. Heat shimmers dance on the horizon. Drink water or suffer.
Overcast sky with a cool breeze. Comfortable travel weather — almost pleasant.
Light drizzle and drifting fog. Visibility is poor; sounds are muffled and strange.
Heavy downpour! Thunder crashes and lightning splits the sky. Seek shelter or get soaked.
Howling blizzard whips snow and ice across the land. Frozen winds cut through any cloak.
An arcane storm! Purple lightning arcs between clouds, strange symbols flicker in the sky, and the air hums with wild magic.
